sentences.arabic: الْتَقَتْ سُعَادُ بِقَرِيبَتِهَا فِي حَفْلَةِ الزَّفَافِ.
sentences.translation: Suad je srela svoju rodbinicu na vjenčanju.
sentences.translationEn: Souad met her relative at the wedding party.
She hadn't seen her for a year.

sentences.translation: Razgovarale su o djeci i poslu.
sentences.translationEn: They talked about the children and work.

sentences.translation: Obećale su da će se uskoro posjetiti.
sentences.translationEn: They promised to visit each other soon.
